project.name: osdcloud-win11-deployment-lab
project.current_goal: Repeatable Web-console-first OSDCloud/iPXE deployment flow for Windows 11 Pro 25H2 zh-TW.

development.purpose: Edit code, docs, tests, commit, and push.

deployment_clone.purpose: Pull pushed commits and run deployment-facing tests from a production-like clone.

runtime.purpose: Product-managed OSDCloud runtime/install root created or updated only by the normal deployment workflow.

development.summary: Development happens in the copied Codex workspace; deployment-facing tests run only after push and deployment-clone pull.

repo_only.policy: Do not use repo-only as the primary remote or a new development starting point.

runtime.allowed_mutation_path: Normal product workflow such as Web Runtime Readiness, Prepare runtime, endpoint sync, preflight, and deployment tests.

git.source_of_truth: Live Git state is authoritative; this tracked status file records workflow context and may not self-reference the commit that contains it.

before_development_work: Only run git pull --ff-only origin-github master when the worktree is clean and current remote state is required or explicitly requested.
after_development_push_before_tests: confirm deployment clone HEAD equals the pushed development commit
forbidden: Do not use the development workspace as the deployment test clone.
Do not edit code directly in the deployment clone.
Do not manually patch, copy into, or directly edit C:\OSDCloud.

recent_changes.summary: Adjusted runtime readiness so generated WinPE boot.wim is required by path but not pinned to host-specific size/hash.
recent_changes.verification: node --check runtimeArtifacts.js; JSON parse runtime-artifacts.json; node --test runtimeArtifacts.test.js; npm test; npm run smoke

recent_changes.summary: Verified deployment clone GitHub sync, setup install, smoke test, and Web startup; initialization stopped at missing deployment secrets.
recent_changes.verification: git pull --ff-only origin master in deployment clone; Node.js LTS installed via winget; Setup-DeploymentServer.ps1 -WebHost 127.0.0.1 -NoLaunch; /api/state and /api/interfaces inspected; no HTTP/TFTP/DHCP deployment services started

recent_changes.summary: Aligned TEST-LOOP.md and status workflow hints with AGENTS.md global guardrails.
recent_changes.verification: rg cross-file consistency and workspace isolation checks; status JSON parse; git diff --check; no Web/runtime/PXE services started

recent_changes.summary: Moved remaining non-global AGENTS guidance into agent reference files and added repo workflow reference.
recent_changes.verification: rg structure, global-only, guardrail, and reference-retention checks; git diff --check; no Web/runtime/PXE services started

recent_changes.summary: Split task-specific agent guidance into docs/agent-reference and kept AGENTS.md as always-on rules.
recent_changes.verification: rg reference, moved-section, content-retention, and safety checks; git diff --check; no Web/runtime/PXE services started
